mapper.select: SELECT LOWER(table_name_en) AS tableName, name AS dataName, SUM(table_all_count) AS dataCount FROM DP_TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS WHERE primary_organization_ch = '原始库' AND statistics_time >= STR_TO_DATE(#{dateStr}, '%Y-%m-%d') AND secondary_organization_ch = #{name} GROUP BY LOWER(table_name_en), name

SELECT tablename, tablename_ch AS dataName, SUM(records_all) AS tableDataVolume FROM ( SELECT organization_type, sub_organization_name, tablename, tablename_ch, records_all, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY CONCAT(organization_type, '_', sub_organization_type, '_', valvalue) ORDER BY `partition` DESC ) AS rn FROM dgn_inspect_organization_stat WHERE organization_type = #{type} AND sub_organization_name = #{searchName} ) t WHERE rn = 1 AND sub_organization_name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY tablename, tablename_ch;
